Locale and time management functions, C Standard Library functions, and license terms for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License terms for redistribution and use of the software with disclaimers of warranties and liabilities.
- **[local.h](local.h.md)**: Defines constants and a macro for leap year calculation related to the epoch year.
- **[locale.c](locale.c.md)**: Locale management functions for setting and retrieving application locale information.
- **[locale.h](locale.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for locale management in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pbl_std.c](pbl_std.c.md)**: Time and memory management functions for Pebble firmware, including time conversion and safe memory copying.
- **[pbl_std.h](pbl_std.h.md)**: C Standard Library functions for time manipulation and string formatting in third-party apps.
- **[strftime.c](strftime.c.md)**: Implements a localized version of `strftime` for formatting date and time strings with various specifiers.
- **[timelocal.c](timelocal.c.md)**: Defines and retrieves locale-specific time formatting and naming conventions.
- **[timelocal.h](timelocal.h.md)**: Private header for strftime and strptime localization with time format structures.
